case_title: MONICA CIUDAD REAL VS. DEVON CAO et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REAL, MONICA CIUDAD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAO, DEVON INDIVIDUALLY AND JOINTLY MACABIO, CHAD INDIVIDUALLY AND JOINTLY $2,616.17 PRINCIPAL, $3.32 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,844.49, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
